listings.title: Apple Magic Keyboard iPad Pro 12.9 inch 3rd, 4th, 5th, 6th Gen A2480
listings.body: The Apple Magic Keyboard is a sleek and versatile accessory designed specifically for the Apple iPad Pro 12.9 inch models. With a crisp white color and a rigid plastic construction, this keyboard features Bluetooth connectivity and an integrated stand for added convenience. Perfect for those who prefer to use their iPad Pro as a versatile workstation, this Magic Keyboard offers a seamless typing experience and enhances the overall functionality of your device. Made in China, this keyboard is compatible with various generations of the iPad Pro, making it a practical and stylish choice for Apple users.

listings.title: NEW Apple iPad A16, A3354, 512GB WIFI Tablet
listings.body: Purchased this in January! Set it up to my acct but never used it because I have 2 other iPads. Included with the iPad is a brand new magic keyboard and iPad pencil.
